org.ships.vessel.common.types

Interface ShipType<T extends Vessel>

  • All Superinterfaces:
    org.core.utils.Identifiable
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    CloneableShipType<T>, FuelledShipType<V>, SerializableShipType<T>, SpecialBlockShipType<V>
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    AbstractShipType, AirshipType, MarsshipType, OPShipType, PlaneType, SubmarineType, WaterShipType

    public interface ShipType<T extends Vessel>
extends org.core.utils.Identifiable
